title: What If You Could Live on Mars?

scenes.text: Imagine living on Mars in a sealed habitat for an entire year.
scenes.hook_top: LIVE ON MARS FOR A YEAR

scenes.text: NASA is conducting a year-long simulation to prepare for future Mars missions.
Participants experience isolation, limited resources, and a Martian environment.
It’s a test for our survival in alien worlds.
scenes.label: SURVIVOR TRAINING

scenes.text: Follow to feed your curious mind daily.

description: NASA is simulating life on Mars for a year to prepare for future missions. Could you handle it? Follow for daily science!
